title: Dragon Ball Mineverse
description: The Best Dragon Ball Mod on the most recent versions of Minecraft
body:
Require in order to work:
Kleiders Custom Renderer API: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kleiders-custom-renderer-api/files/5654821
PlayerAnimator Lib: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator/files/4587214
AttributeFix:  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/attributefix/files/4911084
Attribute cap is set to 1024, Use AttributeFix mod to set the Cap to 65535(can be changed in configs, 100,000 is recommended)


Features Revamp Soon!

KeyBinds
C to Release Your Power. 
X to Charge your Ki
M to Open the Menu
R to Shoot Ki Blast
J to go Turbo Mode (Increase of Movement Speed)
K to Fly (Need to purchase the Skill)
Hold G to Transform
Press H To Detransform
Z to activate Alternative Function (Basically to use the Second Function of an already set Keybind)


I do not own Dragon Ball, Dragon Ball Z, Dragon Ball GT, Dragon Ball Super and Super Dragon Ball Heroes

Toei Animation, Fuji TV, Akira Toriyama and Funimation own it.

+
